title: Shipment loading
description: Track vehicle, dock, seal, staging, and package loading steps for a shipment order without mixing ASN/EDI concerns.

session.title: Loading session
session.description: Open or update the vehicle and loading context for a shipment order.

packages.title: Package staging and loading
packages.description: Stage packages, load them onto the vehicle, or unload them for the selected session.

empty.selectSession: Select or create a loading session before package actions.

toast.sessionError: Loading session could not be saved.
